existing_features.title: Implement average rating display on the VendorCard/VendorDirectoryPage: compute and show a star rating badge (average of all reviews) for each vendor in the directory listing, using the existing review data from the backend.
Add average rating and review count display to the VendorStorePage public storefront header, pulling data from the existing reviews query so visitors can see the vendor's overall rating at a glance.

Expose the new getVendorRatingSummary backend query in useQueries.ts as a React Query hook (e.g., useVendorRatingSummary(vendorId)), and use it in VendorDirectoryPage and VendorStorePage for displaying aggregate rating stats.

Add a sortable 'Rating' column/option to VendorDirectoryPage so users can sort vendors by their average rating (highest-rated first), leveraging the existing sort controls and vendorDiscovery utility helpers.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add backend support for retrieving all reviews for a given vendor as an aggregate (average rating + count) via a dedicated query function, so the frontend can efficiently fetch summary stats without loading full review objects for listing pages.
